data.title: AdAlta taps Oribiotech’s automated platform to scale CAR-T manufacturing in Asia-Pacific
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

AdAlta Ltd. ( (AU:1AD) ) has provided an announcement.

AdAlta has signed a Memorandum of Understanding with Oribiotech and Cell Therapies to deploy Oribiotech’s IRO automated cell therapy manufacturing platform in Australia and the wider Asia-Pacific region. The deal will see IRO used across AdAlta’s cellular immunotherapy pipeline and at Cell Therapies’ facilities for process development and clinical manufacturing.

The IRO platform is designed to tackle major CAR-T manufacturing bottlenecks by automating key steps, targeting 10–50 times higher throughput, faster production and potential cost savings of 30–50%. By improving scalability and lowering costs, the collaboration is intended to broaden patient access to cell therapies, strengthen AdAlta’s globalisation strategy and reinforce Cell Therapies’ position as a leading regional contract manufacturer in advanced cell therapies.

More about AdAlta Ltd.

AdAlta Limited is an Australian biotechnology company developing next-generation cellular immunotherapies, including CAR-T therapies, with a focus on solid tumour cancers such as mesothelioma. The company aims to build an “East to West” strategy, positioning itself as a developer of scalable, cost-effective cell therapies for global markets, particularly across the Asia-Pacific region.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: A$10.2M

Learn more about 1AD stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Rigaku Forms Capital and Business Alliance with Onto Innovation in Semiconductor Metrology
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Rigaku Holdings Corporation ( (JP:268A) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Rigaku Holdings Corporation has entered into a capital and business alliance with U.S.-based Onto Innovation Inc., tied to Onto Innovation’s planned acquisition of a 27.0% stake in Rigaku from Atom Investment, L.P. The deal is expected to change Rigaku’s largest and principal shareholder profile and deepen an already ongoing joint development effort in hybrid metrology solutions for advanced semiconductors.

Under the alliance, the companies will expand collaboration across research and development, go-to-market activities, and manufacturing and supply chain, combining Rigaku’s X-ray-based CD-SAXS product line with Onto Innovation’s software and analytics. The partners aim to strengthen competitiveness in next-generation semiconductor metrology, accelerate Rigaku’s entry into back-end processes, leverage Onto Innovation’s global customer base, and build a new market estimated at a serviceable available market of at least USD300 million by 2030.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:268A) stock is a Buy with a Yen1300.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Rigaku Holdings Corporation stock, see the JP:268A Stock Forecast page.

More about Rigaku Holdings Corporation

Rigaku Holdings Corporation is a Japan-based manufacturer of industrial and research analysis equipment, specializing in advanced X-ray analysis technologies. With over 2,000 employees worldwide, the company focuses on semiconductor process control, supplying metrology instruments for advanced semiconductor applications and achieving robust annual revenue growth of about 20% in this segment.

Average Trading Volume: 3,452,816

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen529.5B

data.description:

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

HitIQ Limited ( (AU:HIQ) ) has shared an announcement.

HitIQ Limited has appointed Adelaide Crows AFLW star and co-captain Ebony Marinoff as a PROTEQT brand ambassador, leveraging her status as one of the competition’s most decorated and durable players. Marinoff already wears the PROTEQT mouthguard at the elite level, enhancing the product’s credibility and aligning her profile with HitIQ’s focus on evidence-based head impact monitoring and player welfare.

As ambassador, Marinoff will promote awareness of the PROTEQT platform across elite and grassroots sport, emphasizing the importance of accessible concussion and impact data tools for all participants. The company expects her authentic advocacy, rather than purely promotional endorsement, to support wider adoption of PROTEQT in both professional and community contact sports, strengthening HitIQ’s position in the sports safety technology market.

More about HitIQ Limited

HitIQ Limited is an Australian sports technology company listed on the ASX that develops the PROTEQT instrumented mouthguard platform. Its core product uses precision impact-sensing technology to capture head impact exposure data, supporting player welfare protocols and informed decision-making in contact sports such as Australian rules football and rugby across both elite and community levels.

An update from Locksley Resources Limited ( (AU:LKY) ) is now available.

Locksley Resources has appointed Chartered Company Secretary and governance professional Michaela Stanton-Cook as its new Company Secretary, replacing Mr Armstrong and assigning her responsibility for ASX communications. The company also announced a change of its registered office and principal place of business to new premises in Northbridge, Western Australia, signalling a refreshed corporate administration base as it advances its U.S.-focused critical minerals strategy.

These administrative changes underscore Locksley’s efforts to strengthen its governance and compliance framework, which is important as it develops the Mojave Project in California targeting rare earth elements and antimony. A more robust corporate structure may support the company’s execution of its mine-to-market antimony strategy and its ambition to play a larger role in U.S. critical minerals supply chains.

More about Locksley Resources Limited

Locksley Resources Limited is a critical minerals company focused on projects in the United States, particularly the Mojave Project in California targeting rare earth elements and antimony. The company is pursuing a mine-to-market antimony strategy to help re-establish domestic U.S. supply chains, backed by downstream technology partnerships with American research institutions and industry partners.

data.title: Atlas Arteria posts flat Q1 toll revenue amid mixed global traffic trends
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Atlas Arteria ( (AU:ALX) ) has shared an announcement.

Atlas Arteria reported a marginal 0.1% rise in proportionate toll revenue for the first quarter of 2026 versus a year earlier, or 1.6% excluding foreign exchange effects. The group noted mixed traffic trends across its network, with heavy vehicle volumes generally stronger than light vehicles and limited impact so far from global macroeconomic and fuel price pressures.

In France, APRR traffic fell 0.9% but toll revenue grew 1.1% helped by CPI-linked toll hikes, while the A79 and ADELAC posted solid gains in both traffic and revenue. In contrast, Germany’s Warnow Tunnel suffered sharp traffic and revenue declines due to severe winter weather and tough comparatives.

In the United States, Chicago Skyway achieved higher toll revenue on modest traffic growth and price increases, though heavy vehicle volumes declined amid softer freight flows. The Dulles Greenway continued to outperform with 7.6% traffic growth, as congestion on competing routes bolstered its travel time advantage despite winter weather disruptions.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:ALX) stock is a Hold with a A$4.96 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Atlas Arteria stock, see the AU:ALX Stock Forecast page.

More about Atlas Arteria

Atlas Arteria is a listed toll road operator with a portfolio of motorway and tunnel concessions in Europe and North America. Its assets include the APRR Group and A79 in France, ADELAC near Geneva, the Warnow Tunnel in Germany, Chicago Skyway in the United States and the Dulles Greenway in Virginia, with revenues largely under CPI-linked tolling regimes.

YTD Price Performance: -8.45%

Average Trading Volume: 2,426,764

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$6.2B

data.title: 160 Health Expands “160AI Hospital” Network to 102 Public Institutions in China
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

160 Health International Ltd. ( (HK:2656) ) has shared an update.

160 Health International Limited reported that from January 2025 to March 31, 2026, its “160AI Hospital” collaboration model expanded to 102 public medical institutions, up from 82 at the end of 2025. Of these, 54 are Class IIIA and 78 are Class III or above, underscoring strong traction in China’s high-end hospital segment and broad recognition of the Group’s digital healthcare capabilities.

The partner hospitals collectively handle about 84.37 million outpatient visits annually and generate around RMB99.7 billion in yearly revenue, highlighting the substantial operational scale underpinning the company’s platform. Management said the model has moved from pilot to large-scale rollout, and the Group is accelerating deployment of its “Medical Digital Staff” AI systems to deepen integration in clinical workflows, further extend its national network, and support high-quality growth of its digital healthcare business, while cautioning that overall performance remains subject to market and policy uncertainties.

More about 160 Health International Ltd.

160 Health International Limited is a Hong Kong–listed company operating in the digital healthcare and wellness solutions sector. Its core offerings include the “160AI Hospital” operational collaboration model and related AI-enabled systems, aimed at supporting the digital transformation and intelligent upgrading of public medical institutions, particularly higher-tier Class III hospitals across China.

Average Trading Volume: 1,075,055

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$11.91B

data.title: Mitchell Services Delivers Strong Q3 With Earnings Surge and Margin Expansion
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Mitchell Services Limited ( (AU:MSV) ) has shared an announcement.

Mitchell Services Limited reported a strong third quarter for FY26, with quarterly EBITDA rising 110% year-on-year to $11.2 million and EBT swinging to a $5.7 million profit. Revenue increased 3.7% to $48.5 million, supported by improved weather, fewer client delays and prior-year projects moving from ramp-up to business-as-usual operations.

Year-to-date FY26 EBITDA climbed 81% to $32.6 million on modest revenue growth and slightly lower average operating rigs, lifting margins and delivering an annualised ROIC of 26.3%. The company also maintained a solid balance sheet with net debt of $0.9 million after an $8.5 million dividend, and highlighted spare fleet capacity that could provide upside if client demand for rigs strengthens.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:MSV) stock is a Hold with a A$0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Mitchell Services Limited stock, see the AU:MSV Stock Forecast page.

More about Mitchell Services Limited

Mitchell Services Limited is an Australian-listed drilling services provider focused on the mining and resources sector. The company operates a fleet of 88 rigs, supplying drilling capacity to resource clients, with revenue driven by rig utilisation, shift volumes and project mobilisation activity across its customer base.

data.title: Xpedra Strikes Broad Shallow Gold Zones in Maiden Drilling at Springfield
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Thunderbird Resources ( (AU:XPD) ) has issued an update.

Xpedra Resources has reported promising initial assay results from its maiden reverse circulation drilling program at the Springfield Gold Deposit in New South Wales. The first two drill holes intersected broad, shallow zones of gold mineralisation, including 36 metres at 1.84 grams per tonne from 19 metres and 10 metres at 1.28 grams per tonne from 13 metres, with multiple higher-grade intervals.

Management says the results confirm a robust mineralised system and strengthen confidence in Springfield’s potential to host a significant shallow gold deposit. A total of 27 holes for 2,579 metres have been completed, with assays pending for 25 holes over the next four to six weeks, setting the stage for expanded drilling and potentially reshaping the project’s development prospects.

More about Thunderbird Resources

Xpedra Resources Limited is an Australian gold exploration company listed on the ASX under the ticker XPD. The company is focused on advancing its Springfield Gold Deposit in the Lachlan Fold Belt of New South Wales, targeting shallow, intrusion-hosted gold mineralisation along a 1,700-metre-long mineralised corridor.

Average Trading Volume: 1,712,928

data.title: Genesis Energy Discloses Equity Interests of New CFO Emma Oettli
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Genesis Energy Limited ( (DE:1G6) ) is now available.

Genesis Energy Limited has disclosed the equity interests of newly appointed Chief Financial Officer Emma Oettli, in line with New Zealand’s Financial Markets Conduct Act. The notice details her holding of 19,940 ordinary shares in Genesis Energy and performance share rights under the company’s FY2025 and FY2026 equity incentive plans.

Oettli’s interests include two tranches of performance share rights, which entitle her to receive additional ordinary shares subject to plan conditions. The disclosure underscores Genesis Energy’s compliance with market transparency requirements and aligns executive incentives with shareholder outcomes through equity-based remuneration.

More about Genesis Energy Limited

Genesis Energy Limited is a New Zealand-based electricity and gas company listed on the NZX under ticker GNE. It operates as a gentailer, combining electricity generation with retail energy supply to residential, commercial and industrial customers, giving it a significant role in the country’s energy market and access to long-term capital through public markets.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Cleanaway Waste Management ( (AU:CWY) ).

Cleanaway Waste Management has announced that it will hold an Investor Day, at which management will present a refreshed 2026 strategy briefing to the market. The presentation materials, authorised for release by the board, are intended to update investors on the company’s strategic direction and priorities as it continues to position itself as a leading sustainable waste and environmental services provider.

The Investor Day briefing signals an effort to sharpen Cleanaway’s medium‑term roadmap and communicate how its extensive asset base and regional footprint will support future growth. While specific initiatives were not detailed in the release, the event underscores the company’s focus on engaging shareholders and other stakeholders around its role in the evolving waste, recycling and industrial services landscape.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:CWY) stock is a Buy with a A$2.91 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cleanaway Waste Management stock, see the AU:CWY Stock Forecast page.

More about Cleanaway Waste Management

Cleanaway Waste Management Limited is Australia’s leading sustainable waste management, industrial and environmental services company. It operates more than 6,400 vehicles across over 350 locations in Australia, New Zealand and the Middle East, supported by recycling facilities, transfer stations, engineered landfills, liquid treatment plants and refineries.

The company employs a workforce of more than 10,000 people and partners with customers, communities, governments, regulators and industry to provide integrated waste and industrial services. Its stated purpose is to make a sustainable future possible through its broad operational network and environmental solutions platform.
